name: Black Soldier Ant
description: A much tougher evolution of the soldier ant found throughout the Community Garden region. It builds on the red soldier ant moveset, but adds tang spit and far more durability.
behavior: It patrols wide stretches of the Community Garden and often investigates nearby worker ant sounds and local fights. It shares much of the red soldier ant moveset, but adds a tang spit projectile that leaves lingering area denial.
interactionWithPlayer: It is hostile toward the player and extremely durable. Its tang spit is the move that punishes you the hardest unless you dodge it or block it with a shield.
interactionWithCreatures: It roams the Community Garden freely and gets into fights with several local creatures. It also reacts to the nearby activity of other black ants.
strategy: The key is avoiding the corrosive spit. Its bites block much like a red soldier ant, but the projectile hits hard and leaves corrosion behind. Water damage is one of the best answers against this variant.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: 3-Bite Combo: 55. Charged Bite: 85. Stunning Bite: 60. Corrosive Spit: 80.

inflicts: Its bites deal chopping damage. The spit deals sour damage and adds corrosion with a lingering hazard zone.

abilities.name: Charged Bite
abilities.description: A slower but much stronger bite.

abilities.name: Stunning Bite
abilities.description: It breaks guard unless you perfect block it.

abilities.name: Corrosive Spit
abilities.description: It fires a corrosive projectile that applies buildup and leaves behind an area that continues to increase corrosion.

abilities.name: Blocking Stance
abilities.description: It guards the front of its body against light attacks until a charged hit breaks the stance.
